name: Vegetable Broth
recipeIngredient: 3 large Leeks, washed well, ends removed, diced
3 large Onions; peeled, ends removed, diced
2 large Carrots; peeled, ends removed, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the water in a large stockpot.
2. Add the leeks, onions, shallots, carrots, and wine to the pot.
3. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
4. Skim any surface foam.
5. Add the parsley stems, bay leaves, and peppercorns.
6. Return to a gentle simmer and partially cover the pot.
7. Cook for 4 hours, adding more water if necessary to keep ingredients covered.
8. Remove from heat and strain through a fine sieve.
9. Discard solids and let cool slightly.
10. Refrigerate until ready to use. Broth will keep in refrigerator for up to 5 days when well covered, or frozen for 1 month.
Nutritional info per serving: 27 cal; 1g pro, 6g carb, 3% fat (Exchanges: 1 veg)
